summary: Comprehensive testing of Coupon System and CourseDetail features completed. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend coupon application in checkout working perfectly. CourseDetail page correctly shows video player and PDF download for purchased courses.
passed_tests: GET /api/admin/coupons - List all coupons
POST /api/admin/coupons - Create percentage discount coupon
POST /api/admin/coupons - Create fixed value discount coupon
POST /api/admin/coupons - Create coupon with expiration date
POST /api/admin/coupons - Create coupon with max uses limit
PUT /api/admin/coupons/{id} - Toggle coupon active status
DELETE /api/admin/coupons/{id} - Delete coupon
Duplicate coupon code rejection (400 error)
POST /api/coupons/validate - Validate existing TESTE10 coupon
POST /api/coupons/validate - Invalid coupon returns 404
POST /api/coupons/validate - Inactive coupon returns 400
POST /api/coupons/validate - Expired coupon returns 400
POST /api/coupons/validate - Requires authentication
POST /api/payments/create-preference - With coupon code applies discount
POST /api/payments/create-preference - Without coupon works normally
POST /api/payments/create-preference - Invalid coupon creates payment without discount
Course-specific coupon validation - Valid for target course
Course-specific coupon validation - Rejected for wrong course
Frontend: Admin Coupons tab displays coupon list
Frontend: Admin can create new coupon with all fields
Frontend: Checkout page shows coupon input field
Frontend: Coupon TESTE10 applies 10% discount correctly
Frontend: Discount amount and final price displayed correctly
Frontend: Remove coupon button works
Frontend: CourseDetail shows video player for purchased course
Frontend: CourseDetail shows PDF download button when lesson has PDF
Frontend: Lesson list is clickable for purchased courses
Frontend: Buy Now button hidden for purchased courses
Frontend: Price card hidden for purchased courses
Frontend: 'Você possui este curso' badge displayed
critical_code_review_comments: Coupon system implementation is complete and well-structured
All coupon validation rules working correctly (expiration, max uses, specific user/course)
Payment integration with coupons working - discount applied correctly
CourseDetail properly differentiates between purchased and non-purchased courses
PDF download functionality working when lesson has pdfUrl
seed_data_creation: Test user testcoupon@test.com created. Test lesson with PDF was created and cleaned up after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coupon system fully functional. TESTE10 coupon exists with 10% discount. CourseDetail shows video player and PDF download for purchased courses. Use admin credentials to manage coupons. Test user testcoupon@test.com available for testing.
